task.title: Title
task.collision_msg: This task overlaps with existing tasks. How would you like to proceed?
task.error_missing_times: Please provide valid start and end times
task.error_single_day: Tasks must be restricted to a single day (cannot cross 23:59)
task.error_midnight: End time must be after start time (tasks cannot cross midnight)
task.error_smart_fill: Please provide a start date and a valid duration
task.error_collision_check: An error occurred while checking for collisions

weekly.merge_msg: These tasks are consecutive and identical. Would you like to merge them into a single record?
weekly.snap_msg: There is a small gap between this task and the {side} one. Would you like to snap them together?
weekly.collision_move_msg: This move overlaps with existing tasks. How would you like to proceed?

tutorial.step1_content: This tutorial will guide you through the main features of the app.
tutorial.step2_content: Here you can see your whole week. You can drag and drop tasks to move them, or drag the bottom edge to resize them.
tutorial.step3_content: Use the arrows to navigate between weeks.
tutorial.step4_content: Click on any empty slot in the Weekly View to register a new task.
tutorial.step5_content: Let's switch to the Daily View. Here you can see a detailed list of your tasks.
tutorial.step6_content: The Daily View automatically detects and highlights gaps in your workday so you never miss a minute.
tutorial.step7_content: In the form, you can select from your 10 most recent tasks to quickly fill frequently used entries.
tutorial.step8_content: You can always switch back to the Weekly View using the toggle or by clicking the logo.
tutorial.step9_content: Pro tip: Click on any day header in the Weekly View to jump directly to that day's Daily View.
tutorial.step10_content: When a new task overlaps with existing ones, you can choose to "Overwrite" (splitting tasks) or "Displace" (pushing subsequent tasks forward).
tutorial.step11_content: Use "Smart Fill" in the task form to automatically distribute a total duration across available gaps.
tutorial.step12_content: The "Billable Absence" task type counts towards your weekly goal but doesn't count as active work hours.
tutorial.step13_content: Made a mistake? Use the Undo and Redo buttons (or Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Y) to revert your actions.
tutorial.step14_content: Use these buttons to lock moving, editing, or creating tasks. Useful on touch devices.
tutorial.step15_content: You are ready to log your workday efficiently.
